name: markitdown-gateway
description: Intercepts Read on markitdown-supported files (PDF, Office docs, images, audio, HTML, CSV, etc.) and lets you choose: convert to Markdown via the bundled markitdown MCP server, or read the file as-is. Ships the MCP server, the PreToolUse hook, and a /markitdown-gateway:setup command that auto-detects the OS and installs all prerequisites (Python + markitdown-mcp) with no manual config.
